messages.content: You are an assistant with access to tools. Call a tool when it would answer the user's request; otherwise respond directly.
What's the current weather in Kyoto, Japan in Celsius, and also convert 42.5 Celsius to Fahrenheit while you're at it?

function.name: get_current_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a location

function.name: convert_temperature
function.description: Convert a temperature value between Celsius and Fahrenheit
